item.name: Eehs Fan
item.description:
A king among eehs forhnesh, and lord of apohelos 18-α.

[Suitable for printing on extra large canvases.]

fish.guide: In ages past, this shark would swallow whole the wayward sparks of dragonkind, that it might absorb the long-lived creatures' vitality. The “devourer of flames,” as it was known on the Dragonstar, continued its desperate search to the very end, vying for the faintest bits of energy in the sighs of Ultima Thule's spectral dragons.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - The Sea of Stars
